# Newsroom
News, press, and media information about Turing.
Jan 12, 2026
The Secret Turing Master Plan
Turing’s mission is to accelerate superintelligence by deploying AI into real enterprise workflows, learning from where systems fail, and turning those failures into data that compounds model capability. By closing the loop between deployment, data, and improvement, Turing makes frontier intelligence reliable, economically useful, and scalable in production.
[Read More](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/secret-turning-master-plan-jonathan-siddharth-b4mdf/)
![turing master plan cover image](https://images.prismic.io/turing/aWUvbQIvOtkhBWXW_turing-master-plan.webp?auto=format%2Ccompress&fit=max&w=3840)

    #nprogress {
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    #nprogress .bar {
      background: #2e6edf;
      position: fixed;
      z-index: 9999;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 3px;
    }
    #nprogress .peg {
      display: block;
      position: absolute;
      right: 0px;
      width: 100px;
      height: 100%;
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px #2e6edf, 0 0 5px #2e6edf;
      opacity: 1;
      -webkit-transform: rotate(3deg) translate(0px, -4px);
      -ms-transform: rotate(3deg) translate(0px, -4px);
      transform: rotate(3deg) translate(0px, -4px);
    }
    #nprogress .spinner {
      display: block;
      position: fixed;
      z-index: 1031;
      top: 15px;
      right: 15px;
    }
    #nprogress .spinner-icon {
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      border: solid 2px transparent;
      border-top-color: #2e6edf;
      border-left-color: #2e6edf;
      border-radius: 50%;
      -webkit-animation: nprogresss-spinner 400ms linear infinite;
      animation: nprogress-spinner 400ms linear infinite;
    }
    .nprogress-custom-parent {
      overflow: hidden;
      position: relative;
    }
    .nprogress-custom-parent #nprogress .spinner,
    .nprogress-custom-parent #nprogress .bar {
      position: absolute;
    }
    @-webkit-keyframes nprogress-spinner {
      0% {
        -webkit-transform: rotate(0deg);
      }
      100% {
        -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg);
      }
    }
    @keyframes nprogress-spinner {
      0% {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
      }
      100% {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
      }
    }
